name: Ningbo ZhongDa Leader Intelligent Transmission Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningbo ZhongDa Leader Intelligent Transmission Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells motor transmission, micro motor, and high precision gearbox products in China and internationally. It offers RV planetary gear boxes, high precision planetary gearboxes, transmission planetary gearboxes, DC brushless gear motors, hypoid gear motors, roller motors, AC and DC gear motors, small AC gear motors, electric forklift gear motors, power assisted steering and driving wheel gear motors, automatic door motors and sweeping gear motors, and controllers. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Cixi, China.
